Model % = our model's probability of this outcome  ·  SB Odds = decimal odds on SportsBet (e.g. 3.50 means $100 stake returns $350 if it wins)  ·  Win Payout = net profit on a winning $100 bet  ·  Expected Profit = the long-run average profit per $100 staked, weighted by our model's probability — this is the number that actually matters  ·  Suggested Stake = recommended fraction of your bankroll, sized by edge. Model % = our model's probability of this outcome  ·  SB Odds = decimal odds on SportsBet (e.g. 3.50 means $100 stake returns $350 if it wins)  ·  Win Payout = net profit on a winning $100 bet  ·  Expected Profit = the long-run average profit per $100 staked, weighted by our model's probability — this is the number that actually matters  ·  Suggested Stake = recommended fraction of your bankroll, sized by edge. Stake Bet Fight Event Odds Model If wins

Caps: max 5% of bankroll per bet, max 5 bets per fight, 15% per fight total, 50% across the whole plan. Bets that can't all win in the same outcome (e.g. "KO round 1" + "fight goes to decision") are filtered. Best case = the single luckiest outcome per fight. Worst case = every bet loses.
